title: African Commission on Human and Peoples Rights v Republic of Kenya (Application No. 006/2012) [2025] AfCHPR 38 (4 December 2025)
text:
AFRICAN UNION 
 
  
 
 
UNION AFRICAINE 
 
 
 
 
UNIÃO AFRICANA 
 
 
 
UNIÓN AFRICANA 
 
 
 
UMOJA WA AFRIKA 
 
 
AFRICAN COURT ON HUMAN AND PEOPLES’ RIGHTS 
COUR AFRICAINE DES DROITS DE L’HOMME ET DES PEUPLES 
 
 
 
 
 
THE MATTER OF 
 
 
AFRICAN COMMISSION ON HUMAN AND PEOPLES’ RIGHTS 
 
V. 
 
REPUBLIC OF KENYA 
 
 
APPLICATION No. 006/2012 
 
 
ORDER  
(COMPLIANCE) 
 
 
4 DECEMBER 2025

i

 ................................................................................................................. 10

Payment of pecuniary reparations, KES 57 850 000 for material

Delimitation, demarcation and titling of Ogiek ancestral lands ................ 15 
iii. Procedures for occupied Ogiek ancestral land ............................................... 20

Right to consultation of the Ogiek ......................................................................... 25

ix. Submission of report on implementation of the Court’s orders ............... 35 
VI. 
ON THE APPLICANT’S REQUEST FOR PROVISIONAL MEASURES AND 
THE ALLEGED CONTINUING VIOLATION OF THE OGIEK’S RIGHTS ......... 36
